# OhWP Studios

> OhWP Studios is a fullstack software development studio building web applications, SaaS products, APIs, and AI-powered software for organisations across Ghana and Africa. We work across government, fintech, edtech, civic technology, and healthcare. Powered by Hodges & Co.

OhWP Studios designs and ships complete, production-grade products — frontend, backend, APIs, databases, and cloud infrastructure — as one accountable team. Core stack: React, Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript, and Python, deployed on the Cloudflare edge and AWS, with AI integrated where it adds real value.

Key facts:
- Type: Fullstack software development studio (not a WordPress shop).
- Location & focus: Ghana and the wider African market.
- Sectors served: government, fintech, edtech, civic, healthcare.
- Pricing: quoted in Ghana Cedis with a USD reference (GH₵ primary, $ secondary).
- Parent company: Hodges & Co.
- Contact: ohwpstudios@gmail.com

## Services

- [Custom Web Application Development](https://ohwpstudios.org/services/custom-web-application): Bespoke web apps built with React, Next.js, Node.js, and TypeScript.
- [SaaS Application Development](https://ohwpstudios.org/services/saas-application): Multi-tenant SaaS products with auth, billing, and dashboards.
- [API Development](https://ohwpstudios.org/services/api-development): REST and GraphQL APIs, integrations, and backend services.

## Technologies

- [Fullstack Development](https://ohwpstudios.org/technologies/fullstack-development): End-to-end product engineering across the whole stack.
- [React Development](https://ohwpstudios.org/technologies/react-development): Interactive, accessible frontends with React.
- [Next.js Development](https://ohwpstudios.org/technologies/nextjs-development): Server-rendered and edge-deployed Next.js apps.
- [Node.js Development](https://ohwpstudios.org/technologies/nodejs-development): Scalable Node.js backends and APIs.
- [Python Development](https://ohwpstudios.org/technologies/python-development): Python services, data, and AI workloads.

## Industries

- [Fintech Software Development](https://ohwpstudios.org/industries/fintech): Secure payments, wallets, and financial platforms.
- [Healthcare Software Development](https://ohwpstudios.org/industries/healthcare): Compliant, reliable healthcare applications.
- [Education Technology Development](https://ohwpstudios.org/industries/education): Learning platforms and edtech tools.

## Solutions

- [AI-Powered Application Development](https://ohwpstudios.org/solutions/ai-powered-application): Products with LLMs, RAG, and intelligent automation.
- [Startup MVP Development](https://ohwpstudios.org/solutions/startup-mvp): Fast, focused MVPs that get startups to market.

## Company & engagement

- [Estimate a Project](https://ohwpstudios.org/estimate-project): AI-assisted project scoping and instant cost estimate (GH₵ / USD).
- [Case Studies](https://ohwpstudios.org/case-studies): Selected client work and outcomes.
- [Open Build](https://ohwpstudios.org/open-build): A livestream show where the community names a real Ghanaian problem and OhWP Studios builds it live.
- [Blog](https://ohwpstudios.org/blog): Articles on fullstack engineering, AI, and building software in Africa.

## Optional

- [Sitemap Index](https://ohwpstudios.org/sitemap-index.xml)
- [Blog Sitemap](https://ohwpstudios.org/sitemap-blog.xml)
